svg.aria-label: High quality security cover for SKT response guide with IMEI check, USIM and eSIM swap, and MFA hardening
svg.title: SKT Security Response Guide: IMEI Check, USIM and eSIM Swap, and MFA Hardening

g.text: SKT Security Guide : SIM, eSIM, IMEI, MFA
Immediate actions after a telecom account security issue
Protect the line, confirm device identity, and harden account login paths
USIM swap, eSIM profile reset, IMEI match check, and stronger multi factor login
Confirm device identity before and after SIM changes
Dial *#06# and compare handset, tray box, and account records
Use carrier support if the reported number does not match your known device history
Reduce SIM swap risk by moving beyond SMS only
Use authenticator apps, passkeys, and offline recovery codes
Review account recovery paths, active sessions, alerts, and trusted devices
